scenes.title: The Problem
scenes.description: Anchor bubble left, framework pain list right — SWOT-style.

clips.content: If you are still doing this, you are leaving reach on the table.
Posting without a hook in the first second loses the scroll before your message lands.
No clear action in the opening beats — viewers bounce before the payoff arrives.
Recycling one template every time makes your feed feel predictable and easy to skip.

backgroundConfig.hint: Swap preset colors, custom swatches, or full-bleed photos. Delete a hero image to reveal the panel color behind it.

scenes.title: The Insight
scenes.description: Title pill and copy left, analytics visual right.

clips.content: Lead with motion, one idea per beat, and a single action at the end. Short-form content wins when every frame earns the next second of attention.
One idea per scene · One action at the end

backgroundConfig.hint: Swap preset colors, custom swatches, or full-bleed photos. Delete a hero image to reveal the panel color behind it.

scenes.title: Value Stack
scenes.description: Three feature cards with thumbnails — polished reel structure.

clips.content: Three beats that keep viewers watching to the end.
Open with motion, a question, or a bold claim — skip the logo intro.
Each scene earns the next beat. Trim anything that does not move the story.
Follow, save, comment, or click — one CTA repeated on the last frame.
